A retry config with 3 total attempts (1 initial + 2 retries)     and fast backof
When ``retry=None``, the call succeeds normally without retry     wrapping.
With retry config, first-attempt success works and no backoff     sleep occurs.
Timeout on first attempt triggers a retry; second attempt     succeeds.
Rate limit (429) on first attempt triggers retry; second     attempt succeeds.
HTTP 401 raises PermanentLLMError immediately with no retry.
All attempts timeout, raising RetryableLLMError after     exhaustion.
If the adapter raises PermanentLLMError directly, it is     re-raised without re
If the adapter raises RetryableLLMError directly, it is     re-raised without re
